channel.title: Blog — Vighnesh Shenoy
channel.description: Recent content on Blog — Vighnesh Shenoy

item.title: Hello, world!
item.description: Just could not resist having that as the title for my first post. I’ve lost count of the number of times I’ve started a blog, only for me to abandon it later. Well, somebody smart did once say – Insanity is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results. – Albert Einstein Hopefully things are different this time around (fingers crossed). So, what am I going to write about?
